title: 8-Week Mindfulness (MBSR-style)
description: Adapted from Jon Kabat-Zinn's Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction (MBSR) program. Meta-analyses (Goyal et al., JAMA Internal Medicine 2014) show moderate evidence for reduced anxiety, depression and pain after 8 weeks of consistent practice.
resources: Goyal, M. et al. (2014). Meditation programs for psychological stress. JAMA Intern Med.
advice: Consistency over duration. 20 min every day for 8 weeks shows larger effect sizes than 60 min thrice weekly. Don't judge sessions — observation is the practice.

subGoals.title: Weeks 1-2: Body scan
subGoals.description: Lying-down body scan. Builds interoceptive awareness — the foundation skill in MBSR.

subGoals.title: Weeks 3-4: Sitting with breath
subGoals.description: Anchor attention on breath. Notice wandering, return without self-judgement.

subGoals.title: Weeks 5-6: Open monitoring
subGoals.description: Awareness of thoughts/emotions as events, not facts (defusion).

subGoals.title: Weeks 7-8: Choiceless awareness + daily integration
subGoals.description: Integrate informal practice (mindful eating, walking) with formal sit.

tasks.title: Formal sit (20 min)
tasks.description: Guided audio matching current week's focus. Same time, same place if possible.

tasks.title: Informal mindfulness anchor
tasks.description: Pick one daily activity (brushing teeth, first sip of coffee) and do it with full attention.

tasks.title: Weekly reflection journal
tasks.description: 3 prompts: what did I notice this week? What was hard? What surprised me?

tasks.title: Mid-program check-in
tasks.description: Rescore PSS-10 (Perceived Stress Scale) — compare with day 0 baseline.
